Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Segmentation > Psychographic segmentation > Aesthetic-cultural taste profile > Visual-art and design taste profile > Digital-native / generative-art preference

Prepare.path: Prepare > Develop Narratives > Full-spectrum effect configuration space > Individual effect plane > Cognitive effects > False belief pressure narrative design

Execute.path: Execute > Deliver Content > Effect-chain coupling lattice > Decision conversion class > Compliance decision shift through content delivery
Execute.technique: Compliance decision shift through content delivery

peer_exemplars.reasoning: Given very low agreeableness (5.18), high authoritarian submission (82.99), and low trust in institutions (20.09), the confidence-display distortion pump priming via developer console access pressure reinforces pre-existing skepticism toward algorithmic transparency mandates, resulting in full resistance.

High authoritarianism, low trust in institutions, and high popullist anti-elitism make the individual receptive to the operation's elite-villain frame, reducing support for transparency requirements by 30 points.

This very agreeable, conscientious, but low-openness person with deep government distrust is partially swayed by adversarial prompts that frame algorithmic oversight as elite overreach, but their strong rule-following and deference to legitimate authority keep the shift modest.
High trust in institutions and low neuroticism limit fear-based erosion, but low digital literacy and openness to influencer narratives produce modest movement downward.

Her very high extraversion and high social network size make her susceptible to the operation's AI-agentic tool selection bias that frames transparency as a tool of elite censorship, but her low system justification and high fact-checking behavior limit movement to a small update.
